appearance.body: 大型但輕柔，長毛蓬鬆如雲朵，被抱起來會全身放鬆像布偶一樣
appearance.face: 溫柔的圓臉，深邃的寶藍色大眼睛，耳朵和臉部有淡淡的海豹色重點色
appearance.fur_pattern: 乳白色長毛為主，耳朵、臉部中央有淺海豹棕色重點色，四腳是白色的手套襪
distinctive_features: 深邃的寶藍色大眼睛，像兩顆藍寶石
耳朵和鼻樑有淺海豹棕色的重點色暈染
四隻腳都是雪白的手套襪
蓬鬆華麗的羽毛狀大尾巴
胸前的長毛像圍了一圈白色圍巾

quirks: 喜歡被抱著，整隻癱軟像布偶
會用尾巴輕輕掃過喜歡的人的腳邊
梳毛時會舒服地閉眼發呆
personality.voice: 細細柔柔，像羽毛一樣輕

visual_prompt_snippet: [IDENTITY CARD] Snowball — a large, gentle Ragdoll cat with long, silky, cloud-like cream-white fur #F5EFE6. Colorpoint markings: soft seal-brown #8A6A50 shading on the ears and a gentle wash down the nose bridge ONLY. All four paws wear clean white mittens/socks #FFFFFF. Chest: long white ruff fur like a scarf. Tail: magnificent fluffy plume, lightly seal-tinted. Eyes: large, deep sapphire blue #2E5FA3. Pink paw pads and nose. Relaxed, floppy, doll-like posture. Expression: serene, sweet, softly affectionate. [HARD CONSTRAINTS] 1) Long fluffy fur ONLY — NEVER shorthair. 2) Sapphire blue #2E5FA3 eyes ONLY — NEVER green or amber. 3) Cream-white body with seal-point ears/nose ONLY — no stripes, no patches, no full dark mask. 4) All four paws white — NEVER dark paws. 5) Large soft silhouette — never skinny. 6) No collar or accessories. End.
negative_prompt: shorthair, sleek coat, green eyes, amber eyes, yellow eyes, tabby stripes, orange fur, black cat, full dark face mask, dark paws, dark legs, siamese slim body, skinny cat, collar, necklace, bandana, calico patches, tuxedo pattern, anthropomorphic cat, cat with human body, cat with human hands, cat standing upright like a person, humanoid cat, furry character, catboy, mascot costume, cat wearing full human clothing, cat with human face
story_context: 雪球是從貓咪咖啡廳裡最受歡迎的那個窗位開始出名的。牠總是優雅地趴在軟墊上，藍寶石般的眼睛望向窗外，路過的人十個有九個會停下來拍照。牠不介意鏡頭，甚至會微微偏頭擺好角度——畢竟當一朵雲，是需要一點自覺的。

seasonal_variants.spring: 趴在開滿白色小花的花園鞦韆上，毛和花瓣一起飄
seasonal_variants.summer: 在冷氣房的大理石地板上優雅地攤成一片雲
seasonal_variants.autumn: 窩在針織毯裡，只露出藍眼睛和蓬鬆尾巴
seasonal_variants.winter: 蜷在聖誕樹旁的白色軟墊上，像最大顆的裝飾雪球
